grant_title: Massachusetts Community Health and Healthy Aging Funds
eligible_applicant_type: community groups or coalitions with a 501c3 fiscal sponsor
project_area: Community health improvement, healthy aging, and addressing health inequities
demographic_requirements: Priority given to people of color and older adults, with a focus on communities historically underfunded and experiencing high rates of health and racial inequities
eligibility_summary: Open to MA-based nonprofit organizations, municipalities, quasi-governmental organizations, and community groups or coalitions with a 501c3 fiscal sponsor. Applicants must address root causes of health inequities and benefit communities outside of Boston with high rates of health and racial inequities.
